name: Delectable Carob Fudge
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the liquid sweetener and nut butter on low to medium heat until hot and soft.
2. Remove from heat and stir in the remaining ingredients.
3. Press the mixture into a 9-inch or 10-inch glass pie plate or similar pan.
4. Press extra coconut or nuts on top.
5. Chill thoroughly.
6. Cut and serve.
7. Keeps up to 3 months refrigerated.
